forbiddenRoutePatterns.message: Workers must not import bun:sqlite directly. All DB writes go via backend/services/ called from main thread pool.
Workers must not import from db/queries/*. All DB writes go via backend/services/ called from main thread pool.
Workers must not import db/connection. All DB writes go via backend/services/ called from main thread pool.
Workers must not call getDatabase(). All DB writes go via backend/services/ called from main thread pool.
